name: Christmas Log: Buche De Noel
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 cups Pillsbury's Best All Purpose Flour, sifted
Fennel Sultanas or candied cherries for garnish
recipeInstructions:
Bake at 350°F for 18 to 22 minutes. SERVES 10 to 12.
Beat the eggs until foamy. Gradually add sugar, salt, and vanilla. Continue beating until very thick and ivory colored. Do not underbeat.
Gradually fold in flour, a quarter at a time, then gently but thoroughly after each addition.
Pour batter into a greased 15½ x 10½ x 1-inch jelly roll pan lined with waxed paper and lightly greased again.
Bake in the moderate oven (350°F) for 18 to 22 minutes. Turn out immediately onto a towel sprinkled with confectioners' sugar. Remove the paper.
Unroll, starting from the 15-inch side, and cool completely.
Spread Chocolate Butter Cream down the center of the log.
Bring the 15-inch sides together so they just meet. Place seam-side down on a serving plate; chill.
Cover with Chocolate Frosting. Draw tines of fork lengthwise through frosting to resemble bark. If desired, garnish with candied cherries or Fennel Sultanas.
